name: Peter Paul Philippine Corporation
description: The company is situated in a prime location near extensive coconut plantations, ensuring a steady supply of fresh coconuts year-round, which is essential for producing specialty coconut products like coconut water.

name: Harmless Harvest
description: The company offers a line of coconut water that combines the hydrating benefits of coconut with a natural energy boost from Coffee and Yerba Mate, highlighting their commitment to quality and sustainability.

name: UJI Foods
description: UJI Foods specializes in providing the purest and most delicious coconut water, reflecting their commitment to quality and sustainability. They source their coconuts from sustainable farms and use 100% recyclable packaging, ensuring an eco-friendly approach to their refreshing products.

name: Franklin Baker Company of the Philippines
description: Franklin Baker is a major global supplier of coconut products, including Single Strength Coconut Water and Coconut Water Concentrate. Their commitment to quality and extensive certifications ensures a reliable supply of high-quality coconut water for various markets.

name: H2coco Pty Ltd
description: H2COCO offers 100% natural coconut water that tastes like it's poured straight from the coconut, emphasizing its commitment to quality and sustainability. Their products are vegan-friendly and free from artificial ingredients, making it a healthy hydrating choice.

name: Genuine Coconut
description: Genuine Coconut offers organic and raw coconut water, highlighting its high potassium content and authentic taste. Their products provide a convenient way to enjoy the natural benefits of coconut water.

name: 100 Coconuts
description: The company specializes in lifestyle-driven coconut water products, including Pure Coconut Water, Coconut Water + Tequila, and Coconut Water + CBD, all designed to provide natural hydration and essential nutrients.

name: Once Upon A Coconut - A Beverage Company
description: Once Upon A Coconut offers premium coconut water that provides natural hydration with no preservatives or added sugars, emphasizing purity and quality. Their products are all-natural and non-GMO, enriched with electrolytes, making them a healthy choice for hydration.

name: Thai Coconut Public Company Limited
description: The company specializes in producing a variety of coconut-based products, including coconut water, which they offer in different forms and packaging. With a commitment to quality and international standards, they source their coconuts from some of the best farms in Thailand.

name: RAW Pressery
description: The company offers 200ML of Coconut Water, which is part of its range of organic beverages, including cold-pressed juices. Their products are 100% natural and chemical-free, making them a healthy choice for consumers.
